title: Simple AFK
description: SimpleAFK is a lightweight plugin that marks players as AFK after inactivity, updates the TabList, and supports a manual /afk toggle.
body:
# Description

**SimpleAFK** is a lightweight plugin that automatically detects when players are inactive and marks them as AFK. After a configurable amount of idle time , the plugin announces in light gray chat that the player is AFK and adds `[AFK]` to their name in the TabList. Players are automatically removed from AFK status when they move or press movement keys (W, A, S, D, or Space). Additionally, players can toggle AFK status manually at any time with the `/afk` command.

This plugin is useful for survival or multiplayer servers that want to clearly indicate who is active and who’s away, keeping gameplay and communication more organized. Server admins can configure the aspects of the plugin easily in `config.yml`, making it flexible for different server styles.

There are no external dependencies. Just drop the plugin into your plugins folder, start your server, and the default config will generate. _Java 17 or higher is required_.

# Commands
- Puts the user in AFK mode
```
/afk
```
